summary: End-to-end testing of EMANATOR_NEW_PIPELINE fourth dogfood run. CRITICAL ASSERTION (Preview renders without 'useAuth is not a function'): PARTIAL PASS. Landing page renders CLEANLY with no errors. However, navigating to Signup page triggers 'ReferenceError: useAuth is not defined' because Signup.jsx was generated WITHOUT the import statement for useAuth. This is a CODE GENERATION issue, not a preview runtime issue. The __namedImport fix is working correctly for files that have import statements (Navbar.jsx, Login.jsx work fine).

integration_issues.issue: ReferenceError: useAuth is not defined (line 10) in Signup.jsx. The file is MISSING the import statement 'import { useAuth } from '../components/AuthContext''. Navbar.jsx and Login.jsx have the import and work correctly.

action_items: FIX CODE GENERATION: Signup.jsx is generated without the import statement for useAuth. The LLM recipe for auth pages needs to ensure ALL files that use useAuth include the import statement.
VERIFY: Check the auth_context recipe in /app/lib/ai/recipes.js to ensure it instructs the LLM to include import statements in all consuming files.
The __namedImport fix in PreviewTab.jsx is WORKING CORRECTLY - it transforms import statements when they exist. The issue is upstream in code generation.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Landing page renders cleanly with NexsaraGate brand, hero, features, footer
PASS: Navbar.jsx has correct import: import { useAuth } from './AuthContext'
PASS: Login.jsx has correct import: import { useAuth } from '../components/AuthContext'
FAIL: Signup.jsx is MISSING import statement - starts directly with 'export default function Signup...'
PASS: AuthContext.jsx correctly exports useAuth function
PASS: ArchetypeHint feature works - shows 'SaaS tool / B2B software' with auto-routes
PASS: __namedImport helper in PreviewTab.jsx works correctly for files with imports
seed_data_creation: Created NexsaraGate project with Creative Brief: Brand='NexsaraGate', Description='A SaaS workspace for marketing teams to automate campaigns across SEO, ads, and email', Pages='Home, Features, Pricing'
context_for_next_testing_agent: The __namedImport fix is WORKING. The issue is CODE GENERATION - Signup.jsx is generated without the import statement for useAuth. Navbar.jsx and Login.jsx have the import and work correctly. The LLM recipe needs to ensure ALL files that use useAuth include the import statement.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: CODE GENERATION INCONSISTENCY: The LLM generates some files (Navbar.jsx, Login.jsx) with proper import statements for useAuth, but Signup.jsx is generated WITHOUT the import. The __namedImport fix in PreviewTab.jsx only transforms existing import statements - it cannot create imports that don't exist.

evidence.signup_jsx: NO IMPORT - starts with 'export default function Signup...' - MISSING

reproduction_steps: 1. Login to Emanator with testprov@test.com / password123
3. Click on the conversation 'A SaaS workspace for marketing teams...'
4. Click Preview tab - Landing page renders correctly
5. Click 'Start free' button - navigates to Signup page
6. See error: 'ReferenceError: useAuth is not defined (line 10)'
7. Click Code tab and compare Signup.jsx vs Login.jsx - Signup.jsx is missing import
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Update the LLM recipe for auth pages to ensure ALL files that use useAuth include the import statement. The recipe should explicitly instruct: 'Every file that uses useAuth must include: import { useAuth } from "../components/AuthContext"'

new_pipeline_verification.archetype_classification: PASS - Classified as 'SaaS tool / B2B software'
new_pipeline_verification.wave_building: PASS - All 4 waves completed (scaffold, public, auth, app)
new_pipeline_verification.double_escape_fix: PASS - Files have actual newlines, no literal \n strings
new_pipeline_verification.symbol_name_fix: PASS - All function names are lowercase (signup, login, logout)
new_pipeline_verification.namedImport_fix: PASS - __namedImport helper works correctly for files WITH imports
new_pipeline_verification.key_assertion_1: PASS - Landing page renders without errors
new_pipeline_verification.key_assertion_2: FAIL - Signup page fails with 'useAuth is not defined' due to missing import
new_pipeline_verification.key_assertion_3: PASS - No 'is not a function' errors (the error is 'is not defined' - different issue)
